ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the weather data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was collected */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in mm */,
  "temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Celsius */,
  "temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Celsius */,
  "wind" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., drizzle, rain, sunny) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (N, S, E, W) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point in Celsius */,
  "snowfall" REAL /* Amount of snowfall in mm */,
  "heat_index" REAL /* Heat index in Celsius */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Maximum wind gust in km/h */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in W/m² */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  "urbanization" TEXT /* Level of urbanization (e.g., rural, suburban, urban) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather condition (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the weather event occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the weather event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of weather event (e.g., storm, heatwave, flood) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in hours */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Impact level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the event */,
  "response_actions" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the event */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Recovery status of the affected areas (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the weather forecast is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the weather forecast was made */,
  "forecast" TEXT /* Textual description of the weather forecast */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast (e.g., 80%) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast (e.g., local, national, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, emergency responder) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the weather station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "sensor_types" TEXT /* Types of sensors installed (e.g., temperature, humidity, wind) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
